userSteps: Create a Google Maps API key (Maps SDK for Android + iOS) at https://console.cloud.google.com and pass it as MAPS_API_KEY (docs/ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES.md).

ios/Runner/Info.plist:
<key>GMSApiKey</key>
	<string>$(MAPS_API_KEY)</string>
	<key>NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription</key>
	<string>Your location is used to show nearby items on the map.</string>
